resume.hero_sub1: 10 years of internet marketing and brand practice
resume.about_content: 10 years of internet marketing and brand practice across three industries: automotive media, EdTech, and travel services. Specialized in building differentiated brand systems from scratch and driving user growth and business value through data. Quick to adapt across industries, reapplying core methodology and picking up new tools and tech fast.
resume.job1_p1: Brand system build: Delivered core frameworks — brand positioning, a nine-tier growth system, and dual-version brand guidelines — within 30 days; independently designed the visual spec and VI application system, building a complete brand asset library that accelerated time-to-market.
resume.job1_p2: Operations matrix: Built the official site from scratch, owning prototype design and interaction logic for 3 core pages; led the WeChat + Douyin system and the annual marketing calendar plus founder-IP strategy, with a 20+ topic reservoir.
resume.job1_p3: Key deliveries: Led multiple brand launch campaigns end-to-end (creative, visual system, 4 keynote modules) and executed several teacher-training events.
resume.job1_p4: Team & process: Assembled the brand and new-media team (design + ops + planning), setting up cross-functional collaboration and a quality-control workflow for production.
resume.job2_p1: Founding & system: Core member from day zero; built the initial ops and marketing teams and standardized workflows, lifting cross-functional efficiency by 30%.
resume.job2_p2: Brand system: Set the dual positioning of "parent-child study tours + quality education," leading the brand from 0 to 1 and upgrading its visual identity with the "one penguin, two stories" concept.
resume.job2_p3: Campaigns: Independently planned and ran 20+ offline study-tour events with 60% on-site conversion and 40% organic traffic growth; social articles gained 40%+ in views.
resume.job2_p4: Custom gifting: Led B2B gifting for clients like HKUST(GZ), Guangzhou Market Regulator, and Foshan Political-Legal Committee, building a stable government-enterprise gifting channel.
resume.job2_p5: PM & innovation: Designed a B2C+B2B dual-engine model; in 2023 led 70% of core projects, launched 20+ study-tour products with suppliers, and drove the mini-program 1.0→2.0 strategic iteration.
resume.job2_p6: Strategic ecosystem: Deep alliance with Hilton Foshan and others, pioneering a "premium hotel + study-tour education" model.
resume.job3_p1: App growth: Via ASO and metadata tuning, lifted daily new users by 21.7%.
resume.job3_p2: Monetization loop: Designed a "points mall + check-in" membership model, pushing activity from 0.5% to 52% (100x+); led the app revamp, raising CTR by 180%.
resume.job3_p3: Tech-driven ops: Led the revamped data dashboard and 12 standard docs, improving decision efficiency by 40%.
resume.job3_p4: Team & collaboration: Quickly built a 12-person cross-functional team (mkt+ops+product), set a "two meetings per week" mechanism, and shipped 5 iterations with product/tech, lifting efficiency 60%.
resume.job3_p5: Brand strategy: Broke homogenization with a "finance + auto" ecosystem and led the exclusive Minsheng Bank partnership.
resume.job4_p1: Membership platform: Led the "MO Card" car-owner membership, defining a "car-owner service ecosystem" position; integrated high-frequency benefits, reaching ~1M users — China's first standardized car-owner benefits platform — driving 20M+ in add-on revenue.
resume.job4_p2: Growth & activity: Designed a "scenario-based benefits + membership growth" dual engine; stable 600K+ MAU (top 2 in vertical), driving 51% of transaction growth.
resume.job4_p3: Resource integration: Expanded refueling, car wash, rescue benefits; built a standardized partner-onboarding flow, lifting efficiency 70% and bringing 20+ new partners.
resume.job4_p4: Brand innovation: "Scenario-based benefits" ops, holiday campaigns, and the first "Car Owner Benefits Day" IP — 80K+ participants per run, 100K+ new sign-ups.
resume.job5_p1: Strategic partnerships: Led travel-scene deals with Ping An Bank, Huaxia Bank and others, launching outbound car rental in their apps — 20K+ travel users, six figures in revenue.
resume.job5_p2: Overseas breakout: Won alliances with Hong Kong Airlines and HK Express; pushed HK order share past 10% and grew outbound self-drive market share 95%; became Asia Miles' first platform partner of its kind.
resume.job5_p3: Content marketing: Planned South Australia Tourism Board roadshows (500+ leads, 20+ major-media mentions); built a "Zuzuche × YesAway × Qyer" tri-party co-brand with 20M+ travel exposure.
resume.job5_p4: Tech solutions: Designed a standardized overseas car-rental API, lifting 2000+ overseas partner integration efficiency by 40%; built a partner back-office cutting order handling from 48h to 6h.
resume.proj1_desc: Using AI to move content and traffic — a car lover's personal-IP experiment. No chasing trends, just real cars and smart driving.
resume.proj1_p1: Hit-content growth: Solo-run WeChat account on deep smart-car analysis; 10+ hit articles, peak interaction 20%+, stickiness well above industry average.
resume.proj1_p2: AI across creation: Used ChatGPT to rebuild topic and headline strategy (40% higher hit rate); MidJourney stickers with 10K+ downloads, aiding ~15% monthly follower growth — a "content + interaction" loop.
resume.proj1_p3: Brand visual: Solo-led the personal site 4.0 revamp with responsive minimalism, shipping a full visual system (key KV, IP, 10+ derivative illustrations).
resume.proj2_desc: Bottling Changsha's mountains, water, city, and people. A "shelter for emotions" for the young, telling a story in every glass.
resume.proj2_p1: Brand from 0 to 1: Positioning, naming, visual system and full design; the "grape" as the symbol, conveying "half everyday life, half poetry" through menu and drinks.
resume.proj2_p2: City-inspired menu: 10 signature cocktails like "Secret Crush Peach" and "Half-Drunk Changsha," bottling the city's awkwardness, ease, drive and romance — the most memorable assets in-store.
resume.proj2_p3: High-frequency social venue: Themed parties — cocktail DIY workshops, tipsy nights, blind tasting, holiday "not-so-serious blind dates."
resume.proj2_p4: Self-pleasing consumption: "Happy-alone set" and "Don't-feel-like-talking" emotional scenarios; users' organic check-ins on Dianping made it a go-to "introvert-friendly bar."
resume.edu_lang_content: Fluent English, excellent written and verbal communication
resume.skill1_c: Brand systems from 0 to 1, visual upgrade, cross-industry integration, data-driven ops strategy.
resume.skill2_c: PGC/UGC content systems and hit-content production; million- to ten-million-impression campaigns.
resume.skill3_c: Million-scale membership systems, points-mall models, dashboards for faster decisions.
resume.skill4_c: Strong data analysis; Notion / Lark tables for workflows; product prototyping.
resume.skill5_c: Led 10+ cross-functional people; 10+ million-scale projects, 100% delivery rate.
resume.skill6_c: ChatGPT / MidJourney / dashboards / ASO / prototyping · agile workflow

about.story_p1: My name is Zhou Yuchuan, friends call me Eddie. Over ten years, I've worked across three very different industries — automotive, education, and travel. I've done BD, marketing, operations, brand; I've founded a company and opened a bar.
about.story_p2: I've seen how large companies operate systematically, and I've tasted the bittersweet reality of startups. Now, I prefer turning that experience into actionable plans — and readable words.
about.story_p3: I believe a brand is not what you say, but what people remember. I believe writing is the best thinking tool. I believe that the act of trying is itself meaningful.
about.resume_note: The résumé is hosted separately, with complete work history, case studies, and skill stack
